prompt: Attach one ornament to each bottom corner of the names block, mirrored on the right.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays a circular black graphic of the text "LOST IN DREAM SPACE". Using image 2 as a style and content reference for the ornament, attach one instance of the ornament to the bottom-left corner of the circular text graphic. Attach a second instance of the ornament, horizontally mirrored from the first, to the bottom-right corner of the circular text graphic.
objects: circular black graphic with "LOST IN DREAM SPACE" text
ornament from image 2 attached to the bottom-left corner of the circular text graphic
horizontally mirrored ornament from image 2 attached to the bottom-right corner of the circular text graphic
